title: Election outcome as predicted by a stranger
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - Tuesday 28 May, the day before the national elections, was an extremely busy one for the George Herald newsroom. Adding to the election buzz, was a visit from Ncedo Hlanjwa of Groeneweide Park, who came to share his election outcome prediction.


> It was not the best time to chit-chat, and no-one knew this chap. However, when he spoke about the elections his eyes lit up and he became very excited.


Hlanjwa told me that he has always been interested in politics, and used to be active in the political scene in Gauteng.

“Do you want to hear my prediction?” he asked.

What could I do, so I said okay. And here it is - the prediction of the 2024 National Election outcome by Ncedo Hlanjwa, recorded on the lawn in front of the George Herald in Ring Road in George Industria.


> VIDEO: Political prediction by Ncedo Hlanjwa


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
